title: lolium scabriflorum
intro: Lolium scabriflorum, also known as rough-flowered ryegrass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Lolium scabriflorum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Lolium scabriflorum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
